message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "havenarbeider" as A
participant "douane en voedselinspectie" as B
participant "scheepsagent" as C
participant "Api gateway" as D
participant "kapiteinsdienst" as E
participant "administratie" as F
participant "containerbeheer en -transport" as G

note over A, B, C, D, E, F, G
per schip
end note

A ->> D: registerVessel
D ->> E: requestOffer
E ->> F: offerCreated
F ->> G: newContainerList
G ->> D: newContainerList

opt [deleteOffer]
D ->> E: offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
E ->> F: deleteOffer

D ->> B: getDocuments
B ->> F: getDocuments
F ->> D: getDocuments

note over A, B, C, D, E, F, G
per havenarbeider
end note

A ->> D: timeBadging
D ->> E: timeBadging
E ->> F: timeBadging
F ->> D: timeBadging

A ->> D: getPayCheck
D ->> E: getPayCheck
E ->> F: getPayCheck
F ->> D: getPayCheck

@enduml
